title: P0-A domain pack contracts baseline
purpose: Provide a repeatable baseline for the 8 Domain / Functional Packs so later hardening can verify selection, hint coverage, and contract readiness without turning benchmark scaffolding into a new platform.
update_policy: Only update this manifest when the shipped scope for domain pack hardening changes.
Do not overwrite living QA evidence; benchmark scaffold records complement docs/16_qa_matrix.md.
Prefer revising seed cases over expanding into a full scoring platform during P0-H.

cases.title: Operations handoff and control reset
cases.description: Workflow bottlenecks, unclear owners, and weak control checks before scaling delivery.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an operations recommendation on handoff design, escalation rules, owner gaps, and execution controls before scaling volume.

cases.title: Finance cash, margin, and runway pressure
cases.description: Cash discipline, margin pressure, and capital allocation before expansion.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a finance recommendation on runway, cash conversion, gross margin pressure, and whether to defer expansion until economics stabilize.

cases.title: Legal liability and obligation boundary
cases.description: Contract risk, obligation ambiguity, and redline priorities before signature.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a legal review on liability carve-outs, unclear obligations, payment withholding, and which terms need immediate redline.

cases.title: Marketing and sales funnel repair
cases.description: Demand generation, conversion, and message-market fit pressure across the funnel.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a funnel recommendation on message-market fit, lead quality, conversion loss, and whether to change channel mix before spending more.

cases.title: Business development and partner channel quality
cases.description: Partnership quality, partner governance, and low-quality channel drag.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a business development recommendation on partner channel quality, enablement, governance, and whether to exit low-quality partnerships.

cases.title: Research signal quality and uncertainty check
cases.description: Sparse or conflicting sources that need recency, source quality, and uncertainty handling.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a research synthesis on uncertain market signals, source quality, recency gaps, and what must be verified before making a recommendation.

cases.title: Organization manager layer and owner gap
cases.description: Manager span, decision-rights confusion, and execution slippage from weak ownership design.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an organization recommendation on manager layer design, ownership clarity, decision rights, and whether the current org can support the next stage.

cases.title: Product / service offer packaging reset
cases.description: Offer sprawl, weak packaging, and low attach-rate across a product-service stack.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a product-service recommendation on offer simplification, packaging, pricing architecture, and whether attach-rate can improve without growing complexity.
